hypothesis: Aggressive config: n_iters=6 (deeper recurrence) + 524K batch (better gradients) + matrix_lr=0.04 (push learning speed) + frac warmdown (proper LR schedule) + multi-skip (gradient highway). On 1xH100 this will be undercooked (~350 steps) but tests whether the config is stable. The real payoff is on 8xH100 where it gets ~1200 steps at full 0.04 LR for 40% of training.
